adr_entry: No new architectural patterns, shared interfaces, or dependency changes. The implementation adds an optional `weight?: number` field to existing `SingleRotationEntry` and `CompoundRotationEntry` types (default 1, backward-compatible). Mode selection and cycling logic in `modeManager.ts` are updated from uniform random/sequential modulo to weighted random/weighted pool traversal — both remain deterministic under the existing PRNG seed. No new modules, no new dependencies, no new shared abstractions.
